title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Go library for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with one command.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, available on PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (langchain-ollama on PyPI) for using Ollama models in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) built with SvelteKit.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java SDK for Ollama, published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight Rust CLI wrapper around Ollama’s REST API for quick prompts and model ops.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that adds local AI code completion via Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for running Ollama containerized with GPU support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selectors.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal React chatbot frontend that talks to a local Ollama instance over REST.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a sidebar assistant powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Custom n8n node to call Ollama models inside automation workflows.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes a chat endpoint proxying to Ollama with CORS and rate-limit.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit demo app for chatting with Ollama models and comparing outputs side-by-side.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation pipeline using Ollama for both embeddings and generation.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a remote LLM service for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.
